allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: multiple bug fixes and improvements for you-draw-i-guess game

Bug fixes:
- Fix canvas mouse coordinate offset \(rect.left -> rect.top for y\)
- Fix new player joining mid-game to receive current game state
- Change round restart timer from 30s to 10s
- Fix game not starting after countdown due to phase race condition
- Add timer management to prevent premature timer firing
- Fix canvas clearing on new round start
- Fix drawing state conflict when canvas is cleared
- Allow guessing during drawing phase \(removed finish drawing button\)
- Fix user list score display for current user
- Sync countdown timers between drawer and guessers

New features:
- Add startup scripts \(start.sh, start.bat\) for convenient launching
- Add bug fixing documentation in doc/bug-fixing/SUMMARY.md

Files modified:
- server/index.js: Timer management, guess phase logic, disconnect handling
- client/src/App.jsx: Phase sync, countdown handling, guess handling
- client/src/components/Canvas.jsx: Coordinate fix, clear state reset
- client/src/components/UserList.jsx: Score display adaptation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: sync remaining time when player joins mid-game

When a new player joins an in-progress game, they now receive the
actual remaining time instead of starting from the full 2-minute or
1-minute countdown.

Changes:
- server/gameState.js: track phaseStartTime and calculate remaining time
- server/index.js: send timeSync event with remaining time on join
- client/App.jsx: handle timeSync event to set correct countdown value

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
